scripts.dev: PY=python3; [ -x .venv/bin/python3 ] && PY=.venv/bin/python3; PORT="${API_PORT:-${PORT:-8011}}"; exec "$PY" -m uvicorn app.main:app --reload --host 0.0.0.0 --port "$PORT" --workers 4 --threads 4
scripts.build: PY=python3; [ -x .venv/bin/python3 ] && PY=.venv/bin/python3; "$PY" -m compileall app && mkdir -p dist && echo > dist/.gitkeep
